Have You Ever Thought the Minecraft Deserts could use a little bit more......Personality?

Well then you would be correct if you said Yes.

 

I present to you Tinted Sands.



 

Tinted Sands is a mod that allows the player to dye sand blocks to different colors.

This mod currently offers 75 Delicious flavors to the Following Blocks:

Sand

Sandstone

Both Types of Chiseled Sandstone (one has the creeper face and im not sure what the other design is called)

Cut Sandstone

Smooth Sandstone

 

Disclaimer This mod is intended for decoration purposes. Use As You See Fit and Go Ham With Your Builds!!!!!




Wanna Help Support Me?
